audit.summary: À la Bonne Franquette has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: core services are not instantly clear.

findings.title: Core services are not instantly clear
findings.evidence: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: French restaurant.
findings.fix: Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.

findings.title: Page is hard to scan
findings.fix: Add clear section headings for services, proof, service area, and final CTA.

findings.title: Trust signal is not strong in the first screen
findings.evidence: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
findings.fix: Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: French restaurant.
proofPoints: 387 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
